item.title: Exchange Support
item.content:encoded:
Version 2.0 released!

  • Added support for Exchanges into Keuss Server. You can find the details in the usage documentation.

item.title: AMQP 1.0 Support
item.description: We have added support for AMQP 1.0 into Keuss Server, using Rhea.
item.content:encoded: We have added support for AMQP 1.0 into Keuss Server, using Rhea. You can find the details in the usage documentation or play with the examples provided in the /test folder.

item.title: New website!
item.description: We got a brand new site for Keuss Server, powered by Docusaurus v2. Chances are, if you're reading this, you already found the site...
item.content:encoded:
We got a brand new site for Keuss Server, powered by Docusaurus v2. Chances are, if you're reading this, you already found the site...

Good old README.md, as simple and convenient as it is, was becoming way too big and difficult to navigate. Also, it is not a proper site worth presenting to the world; hence the decision to add a small, simple enough site to Keuss Server
